# @cascivo/storage

> Persisted signals over localStorage/IndexedDB for cascivo — SSR-safe

[cascivo.com](https://cascivo.com) · [Docs](https://docs.cascivo.com) · [Storybook](https://storybook.cascivo.com) · [GitHub](https://github.com/cascivo/cascivo)

Persisted signals for cascade — sync signal state to `localStorage` or `IndexedDB` with SSR-safe initialisation. Drop-in replacement for plain signals when persistence is needed.

## Install

```sh
pnpm add @cascivo/storage
```
